default.title: Horizon Tech | Enterprise Software, Cloud, kei na AI
default.description: Horizon Tech droinitaka ka solia na parokaramu ni bisinisi, iwali ni AI, iyaya ni o, kei na iyaya vakalivaliva me baleta na timi gugumatua.

home.title: Horizon Tech | Engineering Systems That Scale
home.description: Parokaramu ni bisinisi, AI/ML, iyauqaqa ni o, kei na kena soli na IoT me baleta na timi ni vuravura raraba.

about.title: Me baleta na Horizon Tech | Tabana ni Kaulotu kei na Timi ni Kabani
about.description: Vulica na veika me baleta na Horizon Tech, na noda ilesilesi, kei na sala eda solia kina na iwali ni tekinolaji cecere.

team.title: Timi | Veiliutaki kei na Kenadau ni Horizon Tech
team.description: Sotavi ira na idinia kei ira na iliuliu era tara cake tiko na parokaramu ni bisinisi kei na vatavata ni o ena Horizon Tech.

careers.title: Cakacaka | Tara vata kei na Horizon Tech
careers.description: Vakadikeva na itavi tadola ka vakatubura na nomu cakacaka vata kei na timi ni idinia ni Horizon Tech.

contact.title: Veitaratara kei na Horizon Tech | Tekivuna na Nomu Cakacaka
contact.description: Veitaratara kei na Horizon Tech mo veivosakitaka na nomu cakacaka, gagadre vakamisini, kei na gauna ni kena vakayagataki.

caseStudies.title: Kisi ni Dikevi | Macala ni Horizon Tech
caseStudies.description: Wilika na kisi ni dikevi ni kasitama kei na macala e solia na Horizon Tech ena veitabana ni cakacaka.

blog.title: Blog | Horizon Tech Insights
blog.description: Vakasama vakamisini, lesoni ni veikauyaki, kei na veidusimaki ni vale mai na Horizon Tech.

education.title: Vuli | iVurevure ni Vuli ni Horizon Tech
education.description: iDusidusi, idusidusi, kei na ivurevure ni vuli vakamisini mai na Horizon Tech.

support.title: Veitokoni | Tekinolaji ni Horizon
support.description: Taura na ivurevure ni veitokoni kei na digidigi ni veitaratara me baleta na veiqaravi ni Horizon Tech.

privacy.title: Lawatu ni Veitaqomaki | Tekinolaji ni Horizon
privacy.description: Wilika na lawatu ni itataqomaki ni Horizon Tech kei na yalayala ni veitaqomaki ni itukutuku.

terms.title: Lawa ni Veiqaravi | Tekinolaji ni Horizon
terms.description: Wilika na ivakarau ni veiqaravi ni Horizon Tech me baleta na noda mataveilawa kei na veiqaravi.

profile.title: iTukutuku | Tekinolaji ni Horizon
profile.description: Vakatulewataka na nomu itukutuku ni Horizon Tech, ituvatuva, kei na matailalai ni akaude.

firstTimeSetup.title: iMatai ni Gauna ni Vakaduri | Tekinolaji ni Horizon
firstTimeSetup.description: Vakacavara na ituvatuva ni akaude ena imatai ni gauna me tomani tiko ena Horizon Tech.

forgotPassword.title: Guilecava na Vosanicuru | Tekinolaji ni Horizon
forgotPassword.description: Vakatudonuya tale na nomu akaude ni Horizon Tech.

resetPassword.title: Reset Vosanicuru | Tekinolaji ni Horizon
resetPassword.description: Cakava e dua na vosanicuru vou me baleta na nomu akaude ni Horizon Tech.

confirmEmail.title: Vakadeitaka na imeli | Tekinolaji ni Horizon
confirmEmail.description: Vakadeitaka na nomu itikotiko ni imeli mo vakabulabulataka na nomu akaude ni Horizon Tech.

admin.title: iLawalawa ni Admin | Tekinolaji ni Horizon
admin.description: Vanua ni cakacaka ni veiqaravi me baleta na veiliutaki ni vatavata ni Horizon Tech.

unauthorized.title: Sega ni vakadonui | Tekinolaji ni Horizon
unauthorized.description: Ena gauna oqo e sega ni tiko vei iko na tabana ni Horizon Tech oqo.

services.title: Veiqaravi | Tekinolaji ni Horizon
services.description: Vakadikeva na veiqaravi ni Horizon Tech ena idinia ni parokaramu, AI, o, DevOps, kei na veisau vakalivaliva.

innovationLab.title: Innovation Lab | Tekinolaji ni Horizon
innovationLab.description: Raica na vakatovotovo ni Horizon Tech kei na prototypes ena AI kei na idinia vakayagataki.

authCallback.title: Sainitaki | Tekinolaji ni Horizon
authCallback.description: Vakacavara na curu taqomaki me baleta na nomu akaude ni Horizon Tech.
